content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "The New Year: Meeting Friends". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/723/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single line containing four space-separated integers: a, b, c, and d, representing the coordinates of the meeting points.
content.outputFormat: Print the minimum distance between the meeting points.

solution.approach: Calculate the distances between all pairs of points and return the minimum distance.

code.Python3:
import math
a, b, c, d = map(int, input().split())
dist1 = math.sqrt((a - c) ** 2 + (b - d) ** 2)
dist2 = math.sqrt((a - d) ** 2 + (b - c) ** 2)
print(min(dist1, dist2))
